title: /mwr
text: /mwr Specify the type of middleware used for call-out or call-in when importing or exporting of interface definitions. /mwr= MiddlewareType { OptionalMiddlewareSubswitches } Used With /sti /sto Parameters MiddlewareType —one of the following values: ws —Web service definitions (WSDL). For more information, see Importing WSDL Definitions for Web Services and Exporting WSDL and Schema Files for Web Services Call-In . com —COM type libraries OptionalMiddlewareSubswitches : /bare /dataonly /gen /mod /nosig /pid /pth /verbose Description The MiddlewareType determines the additional switches and parameters that can be specified when importing with /sti and exporting with /sto .
